headlines.title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella testifies in OpenAI trial
headlines.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella took the witness stand Monday in a trial about control of the artificial intelligence startup OpenAI.

headlines.title: Lawsuit says ChatGPT told FSU shooter that targeting children would bring more attention
headlines.description: OpenAI faces a lawsuit alleging that ChatGPT played a role in a mass shooting at Florida State University in April 2025 that left two people dead.

headlines.title: How a massive hack on school software disrupted classes across America
headlines.description: Schools across America continued to flounder Friday after a massive cyber attack that’s thrown final exam schedules and classroom activities into chaos.

headlines.title: OpenAI co-founder says he feared Musk would 'physically attack' him
headlines.description: Co-founder Greg Brockman said he had a tense confrontation with Musk after there was a disagreement about potential equity shares in OpenAI.

headlines.title: Pennsylvania suing AI company after chatbot allegedly posed as a licensed doctor
headlines.description: An artificial intelligence company poses a threat to "vulnerable Pennsylvanians," state officials said after one of the company's chatbots was accused of posing as a doctor with the means to prescribe medication.

headlines.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is 'on massive life support'
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters the Iranian response to a U.S. peace proposal was “stupid” and that the ceasefire is “on massive life support.” NBC News' Jon Allen reports on the war's impasse and how Trump responded to questions over his meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping later in the week.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Supreme Court lets Alabama speed up adoption of congressional map eliminating a majority-Black district
headlines.description: The decision sends litigation back to a lower court as the state races to adopt a congressional map that would eliminate a majority-Black district and more heavily favor Republicans.

headlines.title: OpenAI sued by family of victim killed in FSU mass shooting
headlines.description: The family of a victim who was killed in a mass shooting at Florida State University in April 2025 is suing OpenAI, saying that ChatGPT gave the suspect advice about how to carry out the attack. NBC News’ Danny Cevallos talks about the new legal frontier of dealing with AI and if the chatbot could be viewed as a co-conspirator in this case.

headlines.title: Schools across U.S. disrupted after Canvas education platform hacked
headlines.description: The parent company of Canvas, a popular, cloud-based education platform, says it experienced a cybersecurity incident this week. NBC News' Valerie Castro explains the impact this has had on students.

headlines.title: Canvas Hack Impacts Thousands of Schools Ahead of Finals
headlines.description: A major cyberattack is impacting millions of students across the United States just ahead of finals week. Hackers shut down Canvas, an online learning website that’s used by thousands of universities and schools. NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY to break down what to know about the hack and how it might have happened.

headlines.title: Elon Musk testifies at OpenAI trial
headlines.description: Elon Musk testified in a landmark trial between himself and OpenAI. Musk claims Altman, his onetime associate, had betrayed the altruistic principles the AI company they co-founded was built on.
